model_output.summary: The video is a montage of various clips, many of which do not feature a person or feature a person with their face obscured or turned away, making it unsuitable for consistent AI face replacement.
reasons: The video consists of many clips where the subject's face is not visible (back turned, obscured by phone, or not present at all).
The rapid, frequent scene cuts make consistent AI face replacement technically difficult and visually jarring.
Several segments feature no person at all, which is incompatible with a face-replacement workflow.

best_segments.why: This is the only segment with a clear, front-facing view of the subject, making it the only viable candidate for face replacement.
